data.title: Canadian PM Justin Trudeau Retaliates With 25% Tariffs On US Goods Amid Escalating Trade War (CORRECTED)
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau has announced a 25% tariff on $155 billion worth of U.S. goods. This decision comes as a direct response to the 25% tariffs imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump on Canadian goods, as reported by BNN Bloomberg.

data.title: SpaceX's Starship Explosion During 8th Test Flight Brings FAA Scrutiny, Regulator Opens Mishap Investigation
data.description: The FAA said on Thursday that it requires SpaceX to conduct a mishap investigation into the Starship explosion during its eighth test flight.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 To Enter Bear Market Territory? Next Two Weeks Crucial As 3.5% Fall Following Correction Can Make It A Reality, Warns Analyst
data.description: As Nasdaq 100 entered correction zone, this analyst has warned that another 3.5% fall in next 2 weeks will lead to the bear market territory.

data.title: 'No One Went Broke By Taking Profits': Gary Black On Trimming Tesla Position In November
data.description: Gary Black on Thursday hit back at Tesla Inc bulls who criticized him for trimming the company's holdings in mid-November.

data.title: Fed's Bostic On Rate Cuts: 'Directionality Is Very Much Up In The Air' Amid Trump's Economic Shifts, Tariffs
data.description: Federal Reserve officials may need to wait until summer before gaining enough clarity to adjust interest rates.
